pkgmetadata.longdescription: jieba Python Jieba (Chinese for to stutter) Chinese text segmentation built tobe the best Python Chinese word segmentation module. README.mdGitHub httpsgithub.comfxsjyjieba- - - , - - - - MIT httpjiebademo.ap01.aws.af.cm Python 23 - easy_install jieba pip install jieba pip3 install jieba- httpspypi.python.orgpypijieba python setup.py install- jieba site-packages - import jieba
